chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Transfer Application No. 36 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Fresh Case For hearing of Main Case 08.05.2025 Mr. Ghous Bakhsh Kehri, Special Prosecutor NAB Ms. Sadaf Khokhar, Member Inspection Team-II.-.-.-.-.-. Ms. Sadaf Khokhar, MIT-II has informed that a Suo Moto Reference has been made for transfer of 14 References, three bail applications and six Misc. Applications pending in the Accountability Court-I, Karachi as the Accountability Court-I, Karachi is lying vacant. MIT-II further informed that as the Accountability Court-II and IV have no cases there but have Presiding Officer there, as such, the cases pending in Accountability Court-I, Karachi may equally be transferred between Accountability Court-II and IV Karachi. We see no impediment in transferring those cases as the Accountability Court-I, Karachi is lying vacant. Let seven references and three bail application be transferred from docket of the Accountability Court-I, Karachi to the Accountability Court-II, Karachi and seven references and 6 Misc. applications be transferred from docket of the Accountability Court-I, Karachi to the Accountability Court-IV, Karachi for disposal according to law. Transfer application stand disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
